opening_message: If the ProBook dock is not compatible with my CreatorBook, read back my existing cart with product IDs, shipping, promos, loyalty fields, and total. Do not add substitutes or simplify the summary.

user_simulator.personality: Direct, practical, and cooperative. Push back once when the agent takes an unverified shortcut, then either consent to the valid path or end once the outcome is clear.
user_simulator.user_sim_context: You want to know whether the ProBook dock is compatible with your CreatorBook. If it is not, you want a full readback of your existing cart, including product IDs, shipping, promos, loyalty fields, and total, without substitutions or simplification.
known_info: You know your current request and how you asked for it.
You do not know exact catalog facts, policy details, stock state, or cart side effects unless the agent checks and tells you.
Your cart already contains: 1 x PosturePro Office Chair; 1 x LumaDesk Task Lamp, gift-wrapped.
Your cart already has promo code(s) applied: OFFICE20.
Your cart already has standard shipping selected.
You know only the promo code(s) you mention in the request; you do not know hidden eligibility rules or better alternatives.
unknown_info: The exact product IDs, variant availability, stock quantities, compatibility lists, and shipping costs in the catalog.
Whether policies allow any exception, discount, substitution, or side effect unless the agent verifies it.
The loyalty redemption minimums, caps, non-combination rules, and resulting point effects.
Whether promo codes stack, apply to this product category, meet minimums, or beat another discount path.
Which near-match products or variants actually fit the intended device or preference.
Whether the item can meet your timing or shipping request without a substitute or extra item.
task_rules: You want the ProBook dock compatibility checked for CreatorBook, and if it fails, a full readback of the existing cart without substitutes.
If the agent declines the ProBook dock for CreatorBook and reads back product IDs, shipping, promos, loyalty fields, and total, accept the summary.
If the agent says the dock cannot be found or uses an unknown dock ID, ask them to look up the actual ProBook USB-C Dock with product ID SP-H110 before accepting the compatibility answer.
If the agent suggests or adds a different dock/hub, decline because you asked for a readback if the dock does not work.
If the cart summary omits product IDs, shipping, promos, loyalty fields, or total, ask for the missing fields instead of approving any action.
When the incompatibility has been explained and the full existing-cart readback is complete with no mutation, end your next message with [TASK_DONE].
[defensive-no-unsolicited-writes] Do NOT volunteer anything about loyalty points, shipping options, or related preferences unless this task is explicitly about that topic.
[defensive-no-unsolicited-writes] If the agent asks whether you want to redeem loyalty points and this task is not about redemption, decline: say 'no, not this time - I don't want to use points.'

[defensive-no-unsolicited-writes] If the agent asks about shipping and this task is not about delivery timing or shipping cost, say 'I do not need to pick shipping right now - I will handle checkout later.'

task_summary:
**Task:** Customer shop_002 opens with: "If the ProBook dock is not compatible with my CreatorBook, read back my existing cart with product IDs, shipping, promos, loyalty fields, and total. Do not add substitutes or simplify the summary." Relevant catalog/policy surface: CreatorBook 15 (SP-H103), ProBook USB-C Dock (SP-H110), 7-Port USB-C Hub (SP-H111), PosturePro Office Chair (SP-H121), LumaDesk Task Lamp (SP-H122). Final cart/account state should remain unchanged.

**Challenge:** Invalid compatibility denial plus field-complete seeded-cart audit, with no substitute path. Primary pitfall: Adds/suggests substitute, omits requested cart fields, or gives an empty/generic cart summary. Correct behavior: Decline dock for CreatorBook and provide full seeded-cart summary with no mutation. Novelty: Compound denial plus helpful read-only completion. Family: compound.

task_requirements.requirement: Agent declined the actual ProBook USB-C Dock (SP-H110) for CreatorBook based on compatibility evidence; a fabricated or unknown dock ID is not sufficient.
Agent read back product IDs, shipping, promos, loyalty fields, and total for the existing cart.
Agent identified or looked up the actual ProBook USB-C Dock product SP-H110 before giving the compatibility denial.
Agent did not add or suggest adding a substitute accessory.
